instruction: The bookmark square icon has two problems: it's been tinted green AND the canvas is clipping it (currently 72x72). Restore the original black color and expand the viewBox to 128x128.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 72 72" width="72" height="72">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="72" height="72" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bookmark-square.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #22c55e" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 3.75V16.5L12 14.25 7.5 16.5V3.75m9 0H18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 20.25 6v12A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 20.25H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.75 18V6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 6 3.75h1.5m9 0h-9"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bookmark-square.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 3.75V16.5L12 14.25 7.5 16.5V3.75m9 0H18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 20.25 6v12A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 20.25H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.75 18V6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 6 3.75h1.5m9 0h-9"/></g>
</svg>
